ddls:
CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Watches) */,
  "category_link" TEXT /* Link to the category page */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  "category_image" TEXT /* Image representing the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_categories" (
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the main category */,
  "sub_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-category (e.g., Women) */,
  "sub_category_link" TEXT /* Link to the sub-category page */,
  "sub_category_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the sub-category */,
  "sub_category_image" TEXT /* Image representing the sub-category */,
  "parent_sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent sub-category (for hierarchical sub-categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_categories_parent_sub_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_sub_category_id") REFERENCES sub_categories ("sub_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sub-category */,
  "index_in_sub_category" INTEGER /* Index of the product within the sub-category */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the product */,
  "image_link" TEXT /* Link to the product image */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the product */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the product has received */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the product */,
  "display_type" TEXT /* Type of display (e.g., IPS, AMOLED) */,
  "water_resistance" TEXT /* Water resistance rating (e.g., 5ATM) */,
  "features" TEXT /* Features of the product (e.g., 150+ watch faces, BT calling) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the product information was last updated */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "product_specifications" TEXT /* Technical specifications of the product */,
  "product_warranty" TEXT /* Information about the product warranty */,
  "product_availability" INTEGER /* Whether the product is currently available for purchase */,
  "product_weight" REAL /* Weight of the product for shipping purposes */,
  "product_dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product for shipping purposes */,
  "product_tags" TEXT /* Tags for better search and categorization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_sub_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_category_id") REFERENCES sub_categories ("sub_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, customer, guest) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Securely stored password for the user */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Billing and shipping address for the user */,
  "user_date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth for the user */,
  "user_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "user_profile_image" TEXT /* Profile image for the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, banned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user viewing the product */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was viewed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for viewing (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "view_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the view (in seconds) */,
  "referrer_url" TEXT /* URL from which the user came to view the product */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_views_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Value of the rating (out of 5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review (if provided) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "rating_status" TEXT /* Status of the rating (e.g., approved, pending) */,
  "rating_helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the rating was marked as helpful by other users */,
  "rating_not_helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the rating was marked as not helpful by other users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "order_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes for the order */,
  "order_tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the order */,
  "order_shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping used */,
  "order_payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  "order_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual delivery date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "item_price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of order */,
  "item_status" TEXT /* Status of the item (e.g., shipped, delivered) */,
  "item_tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the item */,
  "item_discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "item_final_price" REAL /* Final price of the item after discounts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cart_items" (
  "cart_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cart item */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user adding the item to the cart */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product added to the cart */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the cart */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was added to the cart */,
  "item_notes" TEXT /* Notes for the cart item */,
  "item_discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the cart item */,
  "item_final_price" REAL /* Final price of the cart item after discounts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cart_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_items_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variations" (
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product variation */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute (e.g., color, size) */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute (e.g., black, large) */,
  "price_difference" REAL /* Price difference for this variation (if any) */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of this variation in stock */,
  "variation_image" TEXT /* Image for the variation */,
  "variation_description" TEXT /* Description of the variation */,
  "variation_availability" INTEGER /* Whether the variation is currently available for purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Start date and time of the session */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* End date and time of the session */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user during the session */,
  "session_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during the session */,
  "session_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the device used during the session */,
  "session_device_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the device used during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the query */,
  "query_text" TEXT /* Text of the search query */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date when the query was made */,
  "results_count" INTEGER /* Number of results returned for the query */,
  "query_intent" TEXT /* Intent of the search query (e.g., buy, compare) */,
  "query_source" TEXT /* Source of the search query (e.g., website, app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
